title: Submission on the due date incurs zero late penalty
preconditions: A submission exists with due date 2026-04-10T23:59:59Z and submitted_at 2026-04-10T23:59:59Z
expected_result: The returned final score is 80. No deduction is applied when days late equals zero.

title: Submission one day late deducts five percent from raw score
preconditions: Submission is exactly 1 calendar day past the due date
expected_result: The returned final score is 95. Exactly 5 points are deducted for 1 day late.

title: Submission three days late deducts fifteen percent from raw score
preconditions: Submission is exactly 3 calendar days past the due date
expected_result: The returned final score is 85. A 15-point deduction is applied for 3 days late at 5% per day.

title: Submission twenty days late is capped at zero and not negative
preconditions: Submission is exactly 20 calendar days past the due date
expected_result: The returned final score is 0. The penalty of 100% equals the raw score; the grade does not go below zero.

title: Submission twenty-one days late produces a zero score not a negative score
preconditions: Submission is exactly 21 calendar days past the due date
expected_result: The returned final score is 0. Accumulated penalty exceeds the raw score; the grade is floored at zero.

title: Admin-configured penalty rate of ten percent is applied instead of the default five percent
expected_result: The returned final score is 80. The configured 10% rate is used, not the default 5% rate.

title: Admin-configured penalty rate of zero percent results in no late deduction
expected_result: The returned final score is 70. A zero penalty rate produces no deduction regardless of days late.

title: Penalty rate above one hundred percent is rejected as invalid configuration
steps: Send PUT /admin/config with body setting late_penalty_rate_per_day to 1.10
expected_result: The API returns HTTP 422. The configuration is not updated in the database.

title: Admin-configured grade weights are applied to compute a weighted final grade
preconditions: Admin has configured homework_weight = 0.60 and final_project_weight = 0.40
expected_result: The returned weighted grade is 84. Computed as (80 * 0.60) + (90 * 0.40) = 48 + 36 = 84.

title: Grade weights that do not sum to one hundred percent are rejected
steps: Send PUT /admin/config with body setting homework_weight to 0.50 and final_project_weight to 0.30
expected_result: The API returns HTTP 422 indicating the weights do not sum to 1.0. The configuration is not updated in the database.

title: Grade weights of one hundred percent homework and zero final project are valid
preconditions: Admin has configured homework_weight = 1.00 and final_project_weight = 0.00
expected_result: The returned weighted grade is 75. The final project score contributes nothing when its weight is zero.

title: Earned grade-improvement badge increases final grade by the badge reward amount
preconditions: Student has a weighted final grade of 78
Student has earned a grade-improvement badge with reward_value = 5
expected_result: The returned adjusted grade is 83. The badge reward of 5 points is added to the weighted final grade.

title: Grade-improvement badge does not raise final grade above one hundred
preconditions: Student has a weighted final grade of 98
Student has earned a grade-improvement badge with reward_value = 5
expected_result: The returned adjusted grade is 100. The grade is capped at 100 and does not exceed the maximum.

title: No badge earned means no grade improvement is applied
preconditions: Student has a weighted final grade of 78
expected_result: The returned adjusted grade is 78. No change is made when there are no badge rewards to apply.

title: Redeeming a late-penalty waiver badge removes the late deduction from the submission
preconditions: Submission is 2 days late resulting in a penalized score of 81
Student has earned a late-penalty waiver badge for this submission
expected_result: The returned score is 90. The late penalty of 9 points is waived and the raw score is returned unchanged.

title: Late-penalty waiver badge does not affect scores for on-time submissions
preconditions: Submission is on time with days late equal to zero
Student has a late-penalty waiver badge
expected_result: The returned score is 90. Applying a waiver to an on-time submission produces no change.

title: Late penalty is applied normally when no waiver badge is redeemed
preconditions: Student has no late-penalty waiver badge
expected_result: The returned score is 81. The full late penalty of 9 points is applied because no waiver is active.
